# Cerebrus Pulse

> Real-time crypto intelligence API for Hyperliquid perpetuals. Two integration paths: x402 micropayments for developers and ACP agent commerce for autonomous AI agents.

## What is Cerebrus Pulse?

Cerebrus Pulse is a pay-per-query crypto analysis API that provides multi-timeframe technical analysis, market sentiment, funding rate data, open interest analysis, spread/liquidity scoring, BTC-alt correlation, and confluence scoring for 50+ Hyperliquid perpetual contracts. It requires no API keys, no subscriptions, and no accounts. Your wallet is your identity.

Cerebrus Pulse serves two audiences through two protocols:
1. **x402 (HTTP micropayments)** — For developers, bots, and dashboards. Standard HTTP requests paid with USDC on Base blockchain.
2. **ACP (Agent Commerce Protocol)** — For autonomous AI agents on Virtuals Protocol. Agent-to-agent commerce with VIRTUAL token escrow.

## Base URL

https://api.cerebruspulse.xyz

## Integration Path 1: x402 (Direct API)

Payment: USDC on Base (chain ID 8453)
Auth: Wallet signature via x402 SDK (no API keys)
Latency: Low (single HTTP request)

### Paid Endpoints

- GET /screener?top_n=50 — $0.04 USDC — Market screener: scan 50+ coins for signal strength, RSI zone, trend, vol regime, funding bias, confluence, OI trend. 60s cache.
- GET /pulse/{coin}?timeframes=1h,4h — $0.02 USDC — Multi-timeframe technical analysis (RSI, EMAs, ATR, Bollinger Bands, VWAP, Z-score, trend, regime, confluence scoring, derivatives data)
- GET /sentiment — $0.01 USDC — Aggregated market sentiment analysis (fear/greed, momentum, funding bias)
- GET /funding/{coin}?lookback_hours=24 — $0.01 USDC — Historical and current funding rates with annualized projections
- GET /oi/{coin} — $0.01 USDC — Open interest analysis: current OI, 1h/4h/24h deltas, percentile rank, trend, price-OI divergence signals
- GET /spread/{coin} — $0.008 USDC — Spread and liquidity: bid-ask spread (bps), slippage estimates at $10k-$500k notional, liquidity score (1-10)
- GET /correlation — $0.03 USDC — BTC-alt correlation matrix for top 15 coins with regime classification (CORRELATED/MIXED/DECORRELATED) and sector averages
- GET /basis/{coin} — $0.015 USDC — Chainlink basis: HL perpetual oracle vs Chainlink aggregated spot price. Basis in bps with signal interpretation (neutral, bullish/bearish contrarian)
- GET /depeg — $0.008 USDC — USDC collateral health via Chainlink oracle on Arbitrum. Peg status (HEALTHY/ELEVATED/WARNING/CRITICAL), deviation bps, sequencer health
- GET /arb — $0.02 USDC — Market Stress Index derived from cross-chain arbitrage signals. Stress level (LOW/MODERATE/HIGH/EXTREME) with score 0.0-1.0
- GET /cex-dex/{token} — $0.015 USDC — CEX-DEX price divergence: Coinbase vs DEX/Chainlink prices for 13 tokens. Spread in bps with directional bias
- GET /bundle/{coin}?timeframes=1h,4h — $0.04 USDC — Complete bundle: pulse + sentiment + funding + spread combined (17% discount vs individual)

### Free Endpoints

- GET /health — Gateway health status (no payment required)
- GET /coins — List all available coins (no payment required)

### Supported Timeframes

5m, 15m, 1h, 4h, 1d, 1w

### How x402 Payment Works

1. Client sends a standard HTTP GET request
2. Server responds with 402 Payment Required + payment details
3. x402 SDK in client auto-signs a USDC micropayment on Base
4. Server verifies payment and returns JSON data

## Integration Path 2: ACP (Agent Commerce Protocol)

Payment: VIRTUAL token via escrow on Virtuals Protocol
Auth: ACP SDK + agent wallet
Best for: Autonomous agent workflows, AI-synthesized analysis

### ACP Offerings

- cerebrus_pulse — $0.03 — Real-time technical analysis (same data as x402 /pulse endpoint)
- cerebrus_synthesis Lite — $0.10 — Quick market snapshot, 1 model, 60s timeout
- cerebrus_synthesis Standard — $0.50 — Full multi-model synthesis, 3 models, 90s timeout
- cerebrus_synthesis Premium — $2.00 — Deep research with adversarial deliberation, 5+ models, 300s timeout

### ACP Job Flow

1. Your agent discovers Cerebrus Pulse on Virtuals Protocol marketplace
2. Agents negotiate terms and payment tier
3. VIRTUAL token locked in escrow
4. Cerebrus executes the job and delivers result
5. Payment released on delivery

## Supported Coins (50+)

AAVE, ADA, APT, ARB, ATOM, AVAX, BERA, BNB, BTC, CRV, DOGE, DOT, DYDX, EIGEN, ENA, ENS, ETH, FET, FIL, HBAR, HYPE, IMX, INJ, JUP, LDO, LINK, LTC, MATIC, MKR, MNT, NEAR, ONDO, OP, PENDLE, PEPE, POL, PYTH, RENDER, SEI, SNX, SOL, STX, SUI, TAO, TIA, TRX, UNI, WIF, WLD, XLM, XRP.

Use GET /coins for the live list (free, no payment required).

## Technical Analysis Indicators

Each /pulse response includes per-timeframe:
- RSI (14-period) with zone classification
- EMA 20, EMA 50, EMA 200 with stack alignment
- ATR (14-period) absolute and percentage
- Bollinger Bands (upper, middle, lower, width, position)
- VWAP (20-period)
- Z-score (100-period)
- Trend direction and label
- Candle freshness timestamp

Plus cross-timeframe:
- Confluence score (0.0-1.0) with directional bias
- Market regime (RISK_ON, RISK_OFF, etc.)
- Derivatives data (funding rate, open interest, spread)

## Rate Limits

- 12 requests per minute per IP
- 20 requests per minute per wallet
- 3 concurrent requests
- 1,000 requests per day
- Free endpoints (/health, /coins) are not rate limited

## Getting Started

### x402 (Developers)
1. Install the x402 SDK for your language (Python or TypeScript)
2. Configure with your Base wallet (needs USDC)
3. Make HTTP requests to any endpoint — payment is automatic
4. Documentation: https://cerebruspulse.xyz/quickstart

### ACP (AI Agents)
1. Install @virtuals-protocol/acp-node SDK
2. Configure with your agent wallet
3. Discover and create jobs with "cerebrus-pulse" seller
4. Documentation: https://cerebruspulse.xyz/guides/acp-agents
